mapper.insert: insert into wf_approval_instance ( business_id, business_type, approver_id, current_node, status, create_time ) values ( #{businessId}, #{businessType}, #{approverId}, #{currentNode}, #{status}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: select instance_id, business_id, business_type, approver_id, current_node, status, create_time from wf_approval_instance where instance_id = #{instanceId}

select i.instance_id, i.business_id, i.business_type, i.current_node, i.status, i.approver_id, coalesce(nullif(u.nick_name, ''), u.user_name) as approver_name, i.create_time from wf_approval_instance i left join sys_user u on u.user_id = i.approver_id where i.status = 'pending' and i.approver_id = #{approverId} order by i.create_time desc

select i.instance_id, i.business_id, i.business_type, i.current_node, i.status, n.action, n.comment, n.approver_id, coalesce(nullif(u.nick_name, ''), u.user_name) as approver_name, n.process_time as create_time from wf_approval_instance i inner join wf_approval_node n on n.node_id = ( select max(n2.node_id) from wf_approval_node n2 where n2.instance_id = i.instance_id and n2.approver_id = #{approverId} and n2.action in ('approve', 'reject') ) left join sys_user u on u.user_id = n.approver_id order by n.process_time desc
